normalization.notes: Store encoded Egyptian hieroglyphs and any Egyptian Hieroglyph Format Controls in NFC while preserving source order and transliteration. Do not fold signs to Gardiner IDs or strip orientation notes during analysis.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: selected uniliteral signs, common logograms, determinatives, sign-list IDs, transliteration values, and orientation notes
segmentation.notes: Ancient Egyptian hieroglyphic text can be written right-to-left, left-to-right, or in columns. Early runtime content should store logical sign sequences plus explicit orientation and transliteration metadata rather than trying to infer reading order from glyph facing.
